1209], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "Notice that this is a personal request not purely for \u201cmy\u201d bread for the day but for \u201cour\u201d bread for the day. Victor, a circuit overseer in Africa, explains: \u201cI often sincerely thank Jehovah that my wife and I don\u2019t have to be seriously concerned about where our next meal will come from, nor do we have to worry about who will pay the rent. Our brothers kindly look after us every day. But I do pray that those helping us will manage to handle the economic pressures they face.\u201d If we have sufficient food for many days, we can think of brothers who live in poverty or who are affected by disasters. We should not only pray for them but also act in harmony with our prayers. For example, we can share what we have with fellow worshippers in need. He will guide us forevermore.\u2014Ps. 48:14.", "resource-id": "com.jk.dailytext:id/scripture", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "d65345b", "scrollable-horizontal": false, "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "selected": false, "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 0, 949, 475], "draw": false, "focusable": false, "long-clickable": false, "visibility": "visible", "focused": false, "clickable": false, "abs-pos": true, "font-family": "serif", "class": "android.widget.TextView", "visible-to-user": true, "package": "com.jk.dailytext", "enabled": true, "bounds": [0, 734, 107, 1209], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "A marvelous work of transformation in connection with the earthly part of Jehovah\u2019s organization was foretold at Isaiah 60:17. Those who are young or comparatively new in the truth have read about the evidences of this transformation or have heard about it from others. But how privileged the brothers and sisters are who have personally experienced it! No wonder they are convinced that by means of his enthroned King, Jehovah is guiding and directing His organization! They know that their confidence is well-founded, a confidence all of us share. Hearing their heartfelt expressions will fortify your faith and strengthen your trust in Jehovah. Regardless of how long we have been in the truth, we must tell others about Jehovah\u2019s organization. The existence of a spiritual paradise in the midst of a wicked, corrupt, and loveless world is a modern-day miracle! w15 7/15 1:12, 13", "resource-id": "com.jk.dailytext:id/comment", "adapter-view": With these exciting events ahead of us, what should each of us now be doing? The apostle Peter was inspired to write: \u201cSince all these things are to be dissolved in this way, consider what sort of people you ought to be in holy acts of conduct and deeds of godly devotion, as you await and keep close in mind the presence of the day of Jehovah .\u00a0.\u00a0. "bounds": [1333, 734, 1440, 1209], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "Jehovah\u2019s organization goes to tremendous lengths to provide and help finance modest Kingdom Halls. The work of designing, building, and remodeling them is handled by unpaid volunteers. Since November\u00a01, 1999, more than 28,000 beautiful new centers of pure worship have been provided for congregations worldwide. That means that for 15 years, on average, five new Kingdom Halls have been provided every day of the year. Efforts are being made to support the construction of Kingdom Halls wherever they are needed. This loving provision is based on the Scriptural principle that the surplus of some might offset the deficiency of others, in order that \u201cthere may be an equalizing.\u201d (2\u00a0Cor. 8:13-15) As a result, beautiful new centers of pure worship have been provided for congregations that would otherwise never have had the financial resources to build a Kingdom Hall for themselves. w15 7/15 "enabled": true, "bounds": [2302, 734, 1440, 1209], "pressed": "not_pressed", "scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "For the composite sign of Christ\u2019s presence to serve its purpose, the fulfillment of it would have to be obvious enough to command the attention of those who have been obeying Jesus\u2019 counsel to \u201ckeep on the watch.\u201d (Matt. 24:27,\u00a042) And that has been the case since 1914. From that time onward, the features of the sign have been undergoing fulfillment. Clearly, we are now living in \u201cthe conclusion of the system of things\u201d\u2014a limited period of time leading up to and including the destruction of this wicked system. (Matt. 24:3) Why, then, should Christians today keep in expectation? Out of obedience to Jesus Christ, we remain in expectation. Also, we recognize the sign of his presence. Our expectations are based, not on a naive readiness to believe anything, but on solid Scriptural evidence that compels us to remain vigilant, awake, watchful and, yes, in expectation of this wicked He will guide us forevermore.\u2014Ps. 48:14.", "resource-id": "com.jk.dailytext:id/scripture", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 734, 107, 1209], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "A marvelous work of transformation in connection with the earthly part of Jehovah\u2019s organization was foretold at Isaiah 60:17. Those who are young or comparatively new in the truth have read about the evidences of this transformation or have heard about it from others. But how privileged the brothers and sisters are who have personally experienced it! No wonder they are convinced that by means of his enthroned King, Jehovah is guiding and directing His organization! They know that their confidence is well-founded, a confidence all of us share. Hearing their heartfelt expressions will fortify your faith and strengthen your trust in Jehovah. Regardless of how long we have been in the truth, we must tell others about Jehovah\u2019s organization. The existence of a spiritual paradise in the midst of a wicked, corrupt, and loveless world is a modern-day miracle! w15 7/15 1:12, 13", "resource-id": "com.jk.dailytext:id/comment", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [0, 1209, 107, 2159], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "They gathered them together to the place that is called in Hebrew Armageddon.\u2014Rev. 16:16.", "resource-id": "com.jk.dailytext:id/scripture", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [127, 556, 1313, 1149], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "The war of Armageddon will lead to the magnifying of Jehovah\u2019s holy name. At that time, all goatlike ones \u201cwill depart into everlasting cutting-off.\u201d (Matt. 25:31-33,\u00a046) The earth will finally be cleansed of all wickedness, and the great crowd will pass through the final part of the great tribulation. With these exciting events ahead of us, what should each of us now be doing? The apostle Peter was inspired to write: \u201cSince all these things are to be dissolved in this way, consider what sort of people you ought to be in holy acts of conduct and deeds of godly devotion, as you await and keep close in mind the presence of the day of Jehovah .\u00a0.\u00a0. Therefore, beloved ones, since you are awaiting these things, do your utmost to be found finally by him spotless and unblemished and in peace.\u201d (2\u00a0Pet. 3:11, 12,\u00a014) Let us, then, be resolved to remain spiritually clean, supporting the King of Peace. w15 7/15 2:17, 18", "resource-id": "com.jk.dailytext:id/comment", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [127, 1149, 1313, 2337], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Unless Jehovah builds the house, it is in vain that its builders work hard on it.\u2014Ps. 127:1.", "resource-id": "com.jk.dailytext:id/scripture", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [1333, 734, 1440, 1209], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "Jehovah\u2019s organization goes to tremendous lengths to provide and help finance modest Kingdom Halls. The work of designing, building, and remodeling them is handled by unpaid volunteers. Since November\u00a01, 1999, more than 28,000 beautiful new centers of pure worship have been provided for congregations worldwide. That means that for 15 years, on average, five new Kingdom Halls have been provided every day of the year. Efforts are being made to support the construction of Kingdom Halls wherever they are needed. This loving provision is based on the Scriptural principle that the surplus of some might offset the deficiency of others, in order that \u201cthere may be an equalizing.\u201d (2\u00a0Cor. 8:13-15) As a result, beautiful new centers of pure worship have been provided for congregations that would otherwise never have had the financial resources to build a Kingdom Hall for themselves. w15 7/15 4:9-11", "resource-id": "com.jk.dailytext:id/comment", "ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.widget.TextView", "bounds": [1333, 1209, 1440, 2159], "componentLabel": "Text"}]}
